samples.question: In Greek mythology, who were Arges, Brontes and Steropes?
samples.answer:
According to [S1] and [S2], Arges, Brontes, and Steropes were the Cyclopes, described as three one-eyed primordial giants. They were the sons of Uranus and Gaia, brothers of the Titans, builders and craftsmen.

Additionally, [S3] specifically mentions that Arges was one of the Cyclopes, along with his brothers Brontes and Steropes.

samples.question: Who was the defending champion when Martina Navratilova first won Wimbledon singles?
samples.answer:
According to [S1], Martina Navratilova defeated Chris Evert 4–6, 6–3, 6–2 in the final to win the Ladies' Singles tennis title at the 1985 Wimbledon Championships. This means that Chris Evert was the defending champion when Martina Navratilova first won Wimbledon singles.

Answer: Chris Evert
